stemHtml: If a pilot is planning to fly a PBN procedure classified as RNP 1, which of the following statements is true regarding the aircraft's navigation equipment?

options.a: It must be able to achieve an actual navigation performance accuracy of equal to or greater than 1 NM.
options.b: There must be multiple navigation sources, including at least one inertial navigation system and a GNSS receiver.
options.c: There must be a GNSS receiver that is capable of receiving GBAS signals in order to ensure the appropriate accuracy.
options.d: It must be capable of monitoring its own performance and alerting the pilot in the event of a loss of navigation accuracy.
